validation_command: python -c "import pathlib; src=pathlib.Path('scripts/run/hb_cli.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); checks=['rglob','_get_ar_subdir','rebuild-index','competitions','governance','infra']; missing=[c for c in checks if c not in src]; assert not missing,f'FAIL: missing in hb_cli.py: {missing}'; count_rglob=src.count('rglob'); assert count_rglob>=4,f'FAIL: rglob count={count_rglob}, expected >=4'; print(f'PASS: hb_cli.py suporta subdirectórios (rglob x{count_rglob})')"
